facts: web_design_live_server exposes only /api/live-readonly plus static assets
browser live mode fetches only api/live-readonly and does not submit command_id
live snapshot calls only status, healthcheck, mode_get, accounts_list, and rollout_rotation_inspect
launch_client, sync, mode set, and stable repair commands are not reachable through the live-readonly endpoint
tests cover stale-green failure, ignored command_id query, mode/status mismatch, and static live source wiring
residual_risks: wild_boar_proxy/runtime.py remains dirty outside this contour
web_design_command_adapter contains action command specs for later contours, so this contour relies on web_design_live_server never calling them
direct file-read prohibition is proven by code/test inspection, not dynamic tracing of every imported module
